AISSAOUI Mohammed
AISSAOUI Mohammed
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe B
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe B
Email:mohammed.aissaoui@univ-setif.dz
Email:mohammed.aissaoui@univ-setif.dz
Département:Informatique
Bureau:10
Bureau:10

Mohammed Aissaoui received his master’s degree in 2017 from the Faculty of Sciences, Ferhat Abbas University Setif 1, Sétif, Algeria. He received his Ph.D. degree jointly from the National School of Computer Science (ENSI), Tunisia, and the University of Toulouse JEAN JAURES, France, in 2023. His main research interests are wireless communication and Network Coding.
